PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-19-2020 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Petition to Approve Report on Status of Administration is off calendar as the petition is incomplete/has deficiencies. Status on close of estate is set for December 7, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Court Examiner: H. Trowbridge. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Aug-10-2020 Continued To Oct-19-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Michael F. Woods appearing by CourtCall for Sarina Navarro.

Mr. Woods apologized for the delay, addressed the partition action in Case No. CGC-18-564868, stated that the house did not close, that the decedent's brother passed away during all of this, that there is a pending hearing on 8/24/20 in the Estate of Edward Lopez; PES-20-303622, that once someone is appointed in that case that the partition referee can then file a petition for distribution, that there is a one-sixth interest in a house, and that as soon as he can he will file an accounting. The Petition to Approve Report on Status of Adminstration is continued to October 19, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court addressed Mr. Woods stating that he has all the issues, that he should address all of them, and that he needs to make sure that he provides courtesy copies to the probate examiner.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Probate Examiner: Probate Director Sandy Hilton. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Matter not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Oct-30-2019 Continued To Nov-27-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael Woods for Sarina Navarro.

Mr. Woods reported that they are trying to evict, a brother has disability, that he spoke with the partition referee last week, the tenants agreed to vacate by January 31, 2020, the property will be staged and sold 60-90 days after that, and that he is still learning how to navigate the e-filing system. The Court read the tentative ruling from Oct. 2, 2019.

The Report of Status on Administration is continued to November 27, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Mr. Woods to comply with the Oct. 2, 2019 tentative ruling notes.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-30-2019 Continued To Aug-20-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jun-25-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Woods for Sarina Navarro (Administrator).

Mr. Woods stated that the sole asset is a 1/6 interest in a property located on Cesar Chavez Street, that they filed a partition action and that they can not proceed with an accounting until the property is sold. The existing petition for approval of report on status of administration is off calendar. Status on close of estate is set for July 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Woods is to file his petition by July 23, 2019 which is to be properly served and addresses the issues raised in the Probate Examiner's notes.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Mar-26-2019 Continued To Jun-25-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael F. Woods for Sarina Navarro.

The Court inquired about counsel's efforts in getting this matter back on track. Mr. Woods stated that he'd filed a partition action, that his client's Father's estate will consist of a one-sixth interest in the property, that two of the other owners are the Decedent's Sister and Brother, that they are currently living in the property, that he submitted a default to the Court which was rejected because it requires a prove-up hearing, and that they may need to go to the Housing Court. Mr. Woods also stated that he is hopeful that once the co-owners receive the prove-up notice that they will "come to the table", that the Inventory and Appraisal is done, and they would need at least a six-month continuance. The Court stated that it appeared that until the partition action is resolved that counsel can't go any further, that it would allow counsel time to try, and that the Court may see about mediation if there isn't a resolution by other means. The Court then continued the matter to June 25, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Counsel is to file a status update prior to June 25, 2019.
Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Deputy: K. Chan. Matter Not Reported.

*Please see the Order After Hearing filed this date.

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Feb-26-2019 Continued To Mar-26-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-24-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-14-2018 Continued To Dec-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Woods for Sarina Navarro.

Mr. Woods apologized to the Court for not appearing at the last hearings, stated that there was a calendar mix up, that this estate depends on a 1/6 expectancy interest from the Mother's estate (Mirtha Lopez 297975), that the Aunt and Uncle are in dispute, and that he filed a partition action (Navarro vs Lopez CGC-18-564868) which has a case management conference on calendar for November of this year. The Court informed Mr. Woods that he is here because has not filed an inventory and appraisal, and that he needs to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration. The Court also informed Counsel that the Probate Referee can assign a value to the interest in the Mother's estate. Status on close of estate is continued to December 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of the above mentioned documents. The orders to appear are off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Executor Sarina Navarro and the Attorney Michael F. Woods to appear on November 14, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the Inventory & Appraisal and either a Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration has not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on October 29, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why he failed to appear and why the Inventory and Appraisal, and Petition for Final Distribution or Petition for Approval of Report on Status of Administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
